blocks.text:
Here's the contents of the project root:

```
assets/
CLAUDE.md
Containerfile
deploy/
DESIGN.md
docs/
install.sh
LICENSE
README.md
rust/
src/
tests/
```

The project is a Rust-based CLI tool called "Ninmu Code" (rebranded from "CLAW Code"), with the main Rust workspace under `rust/`, along with supporting files like deployment configs, documentation, tests, and assets.
